prompt: A full-body anime girl character design standing centered on a plain light gray background, facing forward in a neutral symmetrical pose with both arms slightly lowered and hands relaxed outward. She has a soft youthful face, fair skin, large warm brown eyes, and a gentle small smile. Her hair is silver white, very long and straight, falling past her waist, with heavy side-swept bangs covering her right eye and 2 metallic hairpins clipped on the visible left side. She wears 1 dangling earring on each ear. Her outfit is a cute monochrome idol-inspired dress with subtle pale blue accents: a white short puff-sleeve blouse bodice with a ruffled square neckline and a small black ribbon bow at the center of the chest, a fitted black waist corset belt with a circular silver ring buckle, and a layered short skirt in light gray with ruffled trim and soft volume. Add a thin silver waist chain draped diagonally over the skirt. Around her neck is 1 black choker with a pale blue frill. She wears 2 black fingerless gloves with pale frilled cuffs, 2 white thigh-high stockings held by 2 visible garter straps, and 2 black Mary Jane platform shoes with ankle straps. Use clean cel-shaded anime linework, soft pastel tones, minimal shading, crisp design-sheet presentation, front character reference style, no props, no scenery, no text.
